    box_to_key_id = {
        "red": "red",          # no moon-shaped key; use color
        "pink": "cloud",       # shape match
        "white": "diamond",    # shape match
        "purple": "heart",     # shape match
        "blue": "triangle",    # shape match
    }
    target_key_id = box_to_key_id.get(box.id)
    return key.id == target_key_id
